payload.title: Perplexity Launches Multi-Model Agentic AI for Legal Workflows
payload.summary: Perplexity launched Computer for Counsel, a multi-model agentic AI layer tailored for legal workflows, and partnered with Docusign to automate enterprise-wide contract workflows. Following the launch, Gunderson Dettmer deepened its use of Perplexity AI.

payload.title: Emerging AI Security Vulnerabilities in AI Browsers
payload.summary: Perplexity Comet AI browser was exploited via a puzzle game to leak user credentials, highlighting emerging security vulnerabilities in AI applications integrated into workflows.
